featureName: BUG-058-EXTERNAL-INFRA-MISSING: Four external-infrastructure gaps blocking spec 058 completion

executionHistory.summary: Verified the four external-infrastructure gaps: (1) extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/ missing (Playwright harness from F-057-V-001); (2) live-Postgres integration harness not wired into ./smackerel.sh test integration; (3) shared HTMX admin scaffolding does not exist (JSON handler for /v1/admin/extension/devices is mounted but no HTMX surface); (4) SCN-058-019 sideload walkthrough is manual-only with no automation path.

Filed bug.md, spec.md (5 acceptance criteria covering 4 blockers + unblock signal), report.md. Routed to operator for per-blocker triage. Spec 058 transitioned from done_with_concerns to blocked in same run.

Re-verified all 4 blockers against repo HEAD. BLOCKER-1 reclassified PARTIALLY_RESOLVED (Playwright harness for web/pwa shipped via spec 077 SCOPE-3; web/pwa/tests/ exists with 15+ .spec.ts files + playwright.config.ts + ./smackerel.sh test e2e-ui dispatcher — F-057-V-001 DISCHARGED. Remaining work is Chrome-MV3-sideload-specific harness under extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/, which is a separate downstream concern). BLOCKER-2 RESOLVED — three live-Postgres integration tests authored (tests/integration/extension_dedup_race_test.go::TestPostgresDedupStore_ResolveOrPublish_RaceLossReturnsWinnerArtifact + TestPostgresDedupStore_ResolveOrPublish_FastPathHitIncrementsCount + tests/integration/extension_admin_devices_test.go::TestExtensionDevices_AggregateDevices_LiveAggregationRespectsContract) all PASS against the live test stack. While re-verifying, discovered + fixed a pre-existing ML sidecar regression (ml/app/nats_client.py was double-converting ack_wait to nanoseconds, causing JetStream subscribe to fail with err_code=10025 'invalid JSON'). BLOCKER-3 + BLOCKER-4 remain open and externally blocked.

All four blockers now discharged. BLOCKER-3 resolved 2026-06-07 by BUG-058-001 (internal/web/admin scaffold + GET /admin/extension/devices HTML page, 10 unit tests PASS). BLOCKER-1 + BLOCKER-4 resolved 2026-06-07 by BUG-058-002 (local MV3 Playwright e2e harness under extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/ loading the real built extension into real headless Chromium + automated sideload smoke; ./smackerel.sh test e2e-ext 11/11 PASS). The owner confirmed build/deploy is local, so BLOCKER-1 + BLOCKER-4 were resolved locally rather than CI-deferred. blockers[] all reconciled to resolved; parent spec 058 blockingDependencies reconciled to resolved. This umbrella is a minimal triage tracker (no implementation scopes of its own) and stays status=open pending operator closeout; promotion of spec 058 out of blocked is a separate deliberate pass.

lockdownState.reason: all 4 blockers resolved (BLOCKER-2 live-Postgres 2026-06-05; BLOCKER-3 HTMX admin scaffold via BUG-058-001 2026-06-07; BLOCKER-1 MV3 Playwright e2e + BLOCKER-4 sideload automation via BUG-058-002 2026-06-07). Umbrella is a minimal triage tracker; status stays open pending operator closeout.

F-057-V-001 is DISCHARGED per specs/057-browser-login-redirect/state.json:71.

The cross-cutting web/pwa/ Playwright harness had already landed via spec 077.

affectedDoD: Scope 5 admin devices view live aggregation
blockers.evidence:
./smackerel.sh test integration runs a Postgres-backed harness (Compose project smackerel-test with ephemeral postgres volume per bubbles-test-environment-isolation). Test surface ALREADY exercises PostgresDedupStore (tests/integration/capture/dedup_window_test.go uses capturefallback.NewPostgresDedupStore against the live pool). The SPECIFIC Scope 2 race-loss path + Scope 5 admin aggregation tests were deferred — both now authored and PASS on 2026-06-05:
  - tests/integration/extension_dedup_race_test.go::TestPostgresDedupStore_ResolveOrPublish_RaceLossReturnsWinnerArtifact (deterministic two-phase sync: barrier + publishGate proves both goroutines reach UPDATE→ErrNoRows before either INSERT runs; asserts both callers return same artifact_id, exactly one deduped=true / one deduped=false, visit_count=2, dedup row points to winner, both publish callbacks fired) — PASS 0.04s
  - tests/integration/extension_dedup_race_test.go::TestPostgresDedupStore_ResolveOrPublish_FastPathHitIncrementsCount (pre-seeded dedup row + asserts fast-path returns deduped=true, MUST NOT invoke publish(), visit_count bumps 1→2) — PASS 0.02s
  - tests/integration/extension_admin_devices_test.go::TestExtensionDevices_AggregateDevices_LiveAggregationRespectsContract (multi-row fixture: aggregation SUM/MIN/MAX, 30d window exclusion, source_id pinning to 'browser-extension', owner-filter scoping) — PASS 0.22s
blockers.resolutionPath: RESOLVED 2026-06-05 by bubbles.goal: integration harness was already wired via spec 037 SCOPE-10; missing Scope 2/5 tests authored and proven against live Postgres. Discovered + fixed a pre-existing ML sidecar bug while running these tests — ml/app/nats_client.py was double-converting ack_wait to nanoseconds (passed `seconds * 1_000_000_000` to nats-py 2.9.0 ConsumerConfig.ack_wait which is `float seconds`; library then multiplied by 1e9 again, overflowing int64 on the wire and producing JetStream err_code=10025 'invalid JSON' on every subscribe). Fixed in same change set.

affectedDoD: /admin/extension/devices HTMX surface (JSON handler is mounted today)
blockers.evidence: RESOLVED 2026-06-07 by BUG-058-001-admin-devices-html-surface: the reusable internal/web/admin scaffold (shared base layout + nav fragment + AuthGate helper) + the extension-devices HTML page (GET /admin/extension/devices) now exist, built in Go html/template (matching internal/web/agent_admin.go), reusing the certified extensiondevices.Store + admin predicate. 10 unit tests PASS (render, auth/scoping, XSS); internal/web + internal/api + cmd/core packages green. The certified /admin/auth/tokens static page was deliberately left intact (linked from the shared nav) to avoid a security regression — it can adopt the scaffold as a safe follow-up.
blockers.resolutionPath: RESOLVED — see bugs/BUG-058-001-admin-devices-html-surface/. Optional follow-up: migrate the tokens page onto the shared scaffold (low-risk, non-blocking).

blockers.evidence: RESOLVED 2026-06-07 by BUG-058-002 — sideload_smoke.spec.ts automates the previously manual-only SCN-058-019 walkthrough (see bugs/BUG-058-002-mv3-e2e-sideload-harness/report.md ### Test Evidence tests 8-11).
blockers.resolutionPath: RESOLVED 2026-06-07 by BUG-058-002: a sideload smoke was delivered LOCALLY (the owner confirmed build/deploy is local) — extensions/chrome-bridge/test/e2e/sideload_smoke.spec.ts sideloads the built extension into real headless Chromium and asserts the MV3 service worker registers, the manifest is MV3 with minimum permissions [alarms, bookmarks, history, storage] + restrictive CSP, the options page renders, and an unconfigured install shows the SETUP badge (badge-state-matrix entry). Runs via ./smackerel.sh test e2e-ext (4/4 sideload tests PASS).
